description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 23 hrs 48 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 13 mins per day. His activity spanned 6 projects, with most of the time in Java, followed by Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories recorded this week.
